{{Quote|If a blaster is considered the complete history of Corvis Minor, I'm thinking it's not a vacation spot.|[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]|<ref name="X-Wing: The Krytos Trap">''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]''</ref>}}
'''Corvis Minor''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Corvis Minor system/Legends|Corvis Minor system]], which was part of the [[Ciutric Hegemony]] ruled by [[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]].

The system was an extremely unimportant one, and had a boring history. It was this fact that prompted [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to choose it as the topic of an encyclopedic collection that he did not want noticed. Each library in the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] and some other Imperial facilities had what appeared to be a multicard set entitled ''[[The Complete History of Corvis Minor]]''. It actually contained a small, hidden [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]] for use by Palpatine's agents, as no one else was likely to be remotely interested in the history of Corvis Minor. [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] was one of the few who knew of these blasters' existence.<ref name="Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>

{{Star-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''The Complete History of Corvis Minor'' was introduced in the [[Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy|Thrawn Trilogy]] when Mara Jade acquired a new blaster from the volume to replace one confiscated from her. [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] found one during his escape from the ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'', prompting him to wonder, half jokingly, what kind of world would have its history represented by a blaster.
